name: Playtest 14: Volcanic Lair
description:
TESTS: AI-controlled lair actions, lair initiative at 20 (loses ties), gold lair entry in initiative panel, lair action saving throws (DEX/STR), half-damage on success, no-repeat consecutive round rule, lair turn auto-resolves via AI, lair actions target all player-side creatures, damage+condition combo (Tremor applies prone on fail).

The party descends into a volcanic cavern to confront a Young Red Dragon. The lair itself is alive with danger: magma erupts from fissures, the ground trembles, and toxic fumes billow forth. The dragon is AI-controlled, and the lair actions are also AI-controlled (use_ai_for_enemies=true).

lair_actions.name: Magma Eruption
lair_actions.description: Magma erupts from cracks in the floor, scorching all intruders.

lair_actions.name: Tremor
lair_actions.description: The ground shakes violently, threatening to knock creatures prone.

lair_actions.name: Toxic Fumes
lair_actions.description: Volcanic gases billow through the cavern, poisoning the air.
